quote: Did I close my fist around something delicate? Did I shatter you?
author: Taylor Swift

quote: Do you miss the rogue who coaxed you into paradise and left you there?
author: Taylor Swift

quote: My tongue will tell the anger of my heart, or else my heart concealing it will break
author: Shakespeare

quote: Past the curses and cries Beyond the terror in the nightfall
author: Taylor Swift

quote: In black ink my love may still shine bright
author: Shakespeare

quote: Now my eyes leak acid rain on the pillow where you used to lay your head
author: Taylor Swift

quote: I'd meet you where the spirit meets the bones in a faith-forgotten land
author: Taylor Swift

quote:
Your touch brought forth an incandescent glow 
Tarnished but so grand
author: Taylor Swift

quote:
The old widow goes to the stone every day 
But I don't, I just sit here and wait 
Grieving for the living
author: Taylor Swift

quote: How can it be said I am alone when all the world is here to look on me?
author: Shakespeare

quote: And yet, to say the truth, reason and love keep little company together nowadays
author: Shakespeare

quote: I wish to know the fatal flaw that makes you long to be magnificently cursed
author: Taylor Swift

quote: Now you hang from my lips like the Gardens of Babylon
author: Taylor Swift

quote: My pride fell with my fortunes
author: Shakespeare

quote: Staring out an open window, catching my death
author: Taylor Swift

quote: Can't not think of all the cost and the things that will be lost
author: Taylor Swift

quote: Speak low, if you speak love
author: Shakespeare

quote: In the cracks of light, I dreamed of you
author: Taylor Swift
